title: lepidium cyclocarpum
intro: Lepidium cyclocarpum, also known as Desert Cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium cyclocarpum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Lepidium cyclocarpum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used as a raw ingredient in salads and other culinary dishes.
